evidence.source_title: Ali Shariati and the Ideologization of Religion — PBS/Tehran Bureau
evidence.description: Soroush was close to Ali Shariati and was among the first people to rush to Southampton after Shariati's death in 1977
Soroush later sharply criticised Shariati's ideologisation of Islam, arguing it reduced Shiite thought to political ideology

editorial_notes: Personal closeness pre-1977 but deep intellectual divergence later. Soroush criticised Shariati's Marxist historicism and 'ideologisation' of religion. Marked as disputed because the alignment was temporary and followed by public criticism.
